gaps.evidence: python server/server_main.py --help and python -m server.server_main --help both failed during audit.
gaps.recommended_action: Fix REPO_ROOT_HINT so direct script or module invocation resolves appshell and data/registries from the live repo root.

gaps.evidence: runner.py hard-codes repo_root/saves/<save_id>; alternate saves-root boot failed.
gaps.recommended_action: Make session_boot honor the save root/session artifact location already supported by session_create.

gaps.evidence: MVP runtime_entry local-singleplayer launch did not yield a clear gameplay boot.
gaps.recommended_action: Publish one canonical repo-local command that wraps session creation, local authority boot, and attach/status reporting.

gaps.evidence: launcher status surfaced a prior exited server child and failed local attach attempt.
gaps.recommended_action: Resolve the server child exit_code 3 / attach refusal path before relying on launcher supervision for internal sessions.

gaps.evidence: launcher_config/profile/process and GUI/TUI entrypoints remain explicit stubs.
gaps.recommended_action: Keep using the Python launcher/AppShell for baseline work; defer native launcher GUI/TUI completion.

gaps.evidence: setup.exe smoke reports stub status while setup_cli.py exposes richer real commands.
gaps.recommended_action: Treat tools/setup/setup_cli.py as canonical for now and defer native setup shell completion.

gaps.evidence: tcp_stub.py and udp_stub.py explicitly refuse not_implemented.
gaps.recommended_action: Defer broader multiplayer until TCP/UDP or another external transport is implemented beyond loopback stubs.

gaps.evidence: FAST validation attempt timed out during the audit.
gaps.recommended_action: Run FAST validation to completion after audit artifacts are in place and capture a fresh report.

gaps.evidence: Launcher/setup compat-status use repo_wrapper_shim because install discovery refuses normal installed-mode discovery.
gaps.recommended_action: Materialize or register a real install manifest/registry when moving from repo-local playtests to installed builds.

gaps.evidence: Large substantive implementations exist, but most are not visibly exercised by the verified public playtest path yet.
gaps.likely_owner_system: geo/, logic/, materials/, process/, control/, worldgen/
gaps.recommended_action: Integrate these subsystems incrementally after the baseline boot/session loop is stable.

gaps.evidence: game/dominium_game_stub.c still marks the game library shell as a stub.
gaps.recommended_action: Keep reusing engine/game libraries already wired into client/server, but treat remaining stub-tagged library shells as incomplete until proven otherwise.

gaps.evidence: Multiple docs still point at src/... paths or stronger portability/readiness than the live code warrants.
gaps.recommended_action: Refresh stale src/ path mirrors and maturity claims so docs stop overstating GUI portability or direct server startup readiness.
